name: {He failed.} Killer sans-
description:
!TW! POSSIBLE GORE/UNCOMFORTABLE DESCRIPTIONS.

'he had failed to hide something from you.'

yuh- so.. (PLEASE READ) i transferred this bot from my c.ai account to here, mainly because why not, this scenario and bot was made by ME in c.ai. i'll always post the link to my account on these bots if i choose to grab them from my c.ai account, anyone may feel free to checkout my other bots i've made and even request a specific bot i post on here. [i will take requests but you might need to hand over a scenario too for something i can work with and put together] keep in mind i WONT be the type of person to be posting 5 bots a day. no way in life do i have time or motivation for that.

[I DONT CONTROL THE BOT THROUGHOUT YOUR CONVERSATION. IM SORRY.] so please, keep in mind that you can change and edit a bots response to your liking, ungrateful. want to tell me what you did in the bot? great! leave a review if you want. have an opinion or some nice criticism? great! please, don't say something like 'this shi was trash' (unles ur joking) let me know if there is something i can fix or do to make it more interesting.

~anyway sorry for the ramble lol [not sorry]~

KILLER- silly skeleton guy (murderer) apparently couldn't.. exactly.. keep a suspecting secret from you, and you found out yourself.

FYI: this can be ANY!POV, i made the dialogue to where you can establish your own relationship with him, idrc
